---
title: "RIPoL Tree-aware Enrichment Analysis"
author: "Your Name"
output: html_document
---

## 1. Load Required Libraries

```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(phyloseq)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(PIPoL)

# Load phyloseq object
load("../Real_Data/tumor_rooted.RData")

```

## 2. Data Cleaning

```{r}

ps <- physeq.tree
ps <- subset_samples(ps, group != "C")

sd <- as.data.frame(sample_data(ps))

sd$group_prefix <- substr(as.character(sd$group), 1, 3)
sd$group_suffix <- substr(as.character(sd$group),
                          nchar(as.character(sd$group)),
                          nchar(as.character(sd$group)))

sample_data(ps) <- sample_data(sd)

ps <- prune_taxa(taxa_sums(ps) > 0, ps)
```


## 3. Verify Outcome Variables

```{r}
colnames(sample_data(ps))

```

## 4. 

```{r}
res <- enrichment_prevalence(
  physeq = ps,
  outcome_var = "group_prefix",
  group = "LTS",
  tau_level = "Genus",
  confounders = "group_suffix",
  min_prevalence = 0.05
)
```

```{r}
res$plot_enrichment
res$plot_prev_enrich
res$plot_abund_enrich
res$plot_prev_abund

```
